title: libpng15 security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[1.5.30-14.1]
- fix CVE-2026-25646: heap buffer overflow in png_set_quantize (RHEL-148404)
full_text:
[1.5.30-14.1]
- fix CVE-2026-25646: heap buffer overflow in png_set_quantize (RHEL-148404)
